creator: jmd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 158251
svn diff in science/libint

This patch updates the port to 1.1.6, the latest stable upstream release in the v1 series. It also converts the port to use the new upstream github.

Notable patch: the configure.in used upstream does not work with our autoreconf USES and needs a few more AC_DEFINES. If this patch gets accepted, I will try to upstream them.

Also, I would be willing to add more options to the port and work on a libint v2 port if interest exists.

Please note that the original port did not even compile for me.
